EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_CHI2_GOF_UNIFORM_AI_SPEC: BINDING METHOD (user choice: ?Â naÂve uniform). Scope = JSON `sinceInclusive` / `tail` / `periods` only. (1) Main balls 1?50: let n = number of draws in scope, total slots = 5n. For each k?{1,?,50}, count O_k = appearances of k across all five positions of all draws (order within a draw irrelevant). Expected E = 5n/50 each. Pearson ?Â_main = ?_k (O_k?E)Â/E with df = 49. Use PatTool pre-counts in `periods[].mf` / `chi2MainNaive` as cross-check but recompute from `tail` if you show detail. (2) Stars by FDJ era: assign each draw to period P1/P2/P3 using `periodCuts` and JSON `periods[]` starMax (9 / 11 / 12). Within period j with n_j draws and starMax S_j, pool 2n_j star-slots; counts O_s for s?{1,?,S_j}; expected E_j = 2n_j/S_j each; ?Â_stars,j = ?_s (O_s?E_j)Â/E_j with df = S_j?1. State hypotheses explicitly (uniform marginal over slots within era). Do not replace this by generic multinomial-without-replacement theory unless clearly labeled extra; primary deliverable = these ?Â statistics + df + plain interpretation.
EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_ENTROPY_NORMALIZED_AI_SPEC: BINDING METHOD (user choice: normalized Shannon entropy). Scope = draws in `tail` aligned with `periods`. Natural log. (1) Mains: empirical p_k = (count of ball k in pooled 5n slots)/(5n), k=1..50. H_main = ?? p_k ln p_k (0 ln 0 = 0). H_norm_main = H_main / ln(50) ? [0,1]; equals 1 iff uniform on categories. (2) Stars per era j: categories 1..S_j, total slots 2n_j, same formula H_j; H_norm_j = H_j / ln(S_j). Report numeric H and H_norm; interpret as deviation from max-entropy baseline; optional comparison to uniform benchmark.
EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_GAP_RECURRENCE_AI_SPEC: BINDING METHOD (user choice: inter-draw recurrence gaps). Index draws in chronological order as `tail` (index t=0..n?1). For each ball b?{1,?,50}, list indices T_b where b appears (?1 per draw). If |T_b|?2, gaps ?_i = T_b[i]?T_b[i?1]; mean gap ?_b = mean(?). Summarize over balls with ?2 appearances: e.g. mean of ?_b, spread (sd/min/max). Descriptive only; links to renewal/inter-arrival intuition allowed but no forecast claim. Ignore balls with <2 hits for ?_b.
EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_SUM_CORRELATION_AI_SPEC: BINDING METHOD (user choice: Pearson correlation of sums). Consider draws where there are exactly five main integers in [1,50] and two star integers in [1,starMax] for that draw?s regulatory era (derive starMax from date vs `periodCuts`). Let X = sum of five mains, Y = sum of two stars. Pearson r between X and Y across all qualifying draws; report sample size n_used. State formula r = cov(X,Y)/(?_X ?_Y). No causal interpretation; mention linear association only.
EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_MONTE_CARLO_MAXFREQ_AI_SPEC: BINDING METHOD (user choice: Monte Carlo calibration of max pooled frequency). From `tail`, pooled main counts over 5n slots; M_obs = max_{k=1..50} count(k). Null operational model for simulation: independent draws, each draw picks 5 distinct mains uniformly from {1,?,50} without replacement across draws? sampling mechanism is approximated by repeating n independent such draws; replicate R?800 times; each replicate yields M_sim; empirical one-sided p-value = (#(M_sim ? M_obs)+1)/(R+1). State R and that procedure; if you vary R, say so. Not a proof of bias?interpret as descriptive Monte Carlo tail probability.

TV.TITLE: TV — canales gratuitos
TV.SUBTITLE: Vea canales IPTV públicos gratuitos en todo el mundo (TV francesa por defecto). Los flujos son proxyados por el backend PatTool.

TV.ERR_PLAY: No se pudo iniciar la reproducción. Pulse reproducir en el vídeo o pruebe otro canal.
TV.ERR_STREAM: Este stream gratuito está fuera de línea o bloqueado ahora. Pruebe otro canal — muchos enlaces IPTV públicos caen con frecuencia.

TV.ERR_FAVORITES_SAVE: No se pudieron actualizar los favoritos. Inténtelo de nuevo.
TV.WORKAROUND_HINT: Reproducido mediante el workaround oficial de france.tv en directo (HLS tokenizado).
TV.WORKAROUND_ACTIVE: Workaround oficial de france.tv en directo
TV.WORKAROUND_HINT_TF1: Reproducido mediante la API oficial TF1 mediainfo (requiere cuenta TF1 gratuita en application.properties).
